title: Remembering the 3 categories of DPSP
explanation: Use SGL to remember the three broad classifications of Directive Principles.

title: Remembering the 11 Fundamental Duties
explanation: A - Abide by the Constitution, B - Noble ideals of freedom struggle (Bapu), C - Protect Sovereignty & Integrity (Center), D - Defend the country, E - Promote harmony (Equality), F - Value composite culture (Culture/Forts), G - Protect natural environment (Green), H - Develop scientific temper (Humanism), I - Safeguard public property (Income/Infrastructure), J - Strive for excellence (Jackpot), K - Education for children 6-14 (Kids).
